title: Historical Stock Market Returns
description: Interactive bar chart showing S&P 500 annual returns from 1995 to 2024 with hover tooltips explaining market influences each year.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Stock Market
Investing
S&P 500
Personal Finance
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of historical stock market returns
Explore historical stock market returns through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of historical stock market returns to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on historical stock market returns
